audit_disposition.limitation: This artifact hashes source anchors and verifies assertion presence; it does not contain canonical terminal, receipt, replay, or rejection output bytes/digests.
audit_disposition.required_closure: Generate a dedicated executable corpus and have the checker regenerate and compare its materialized outputs.

required_runtime_assertions: FLOW-7 Phase1B.3-D/E terminal outcomes are exact final and memory-stable
FLOW-7 Phase1B.3-D terminal races have one CAS winner
FLOW-7 Phase1B.3-E filesystem restarts preserve all new terminal outcomes
FLOW-7 Phase1B.3-E restart boundaries preserve reconciliation authority

provisional_source_coverage.safe_terminal_hash: source assertions reference content-addressed terminal receipt stability, but no output digest is materialized here
provisional_source_coverage.terminal_source_retry_receipts: source assertions cover the six terminal outcomes and receipt bindings
provisional_source_coverage.exact_rejections: source assertions cover tamper, idempotency, and stale-head typed variants/fields
provisional_source_coverage.restart_parity: source assertions cover representative MemoryStore and FileSystemStore replay/state/receipt comparisons
